title: verbena rigida f. lilacina
intro: Verbena rigida f. lilacina, also known as the purple verbena, is a flowering plant species in the family Verbenaceae. It is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Verbena rigida f. lilacina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
